# OrganicSMM

> AI-organic social media growth panel. Real Instagram, YouTube and TikTok engagement delivered with natural patterns — S-curve growth, peak-hour optimisation and ±50% variance — so accounts stay 100% safe.

OrganicSMM is a wallet-based SMM platform with engagement bundles, multi-provider auto-rotation, live delivery previews, subscriptions and 24/7 live chat support. Sign-up is free; pay per order from your wallet.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features and pricing highlights.
- [Services](/services): Browse Instagram, YouTube, TikTok and Twitter/X services with prices and speeds.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create a free account or log in.
- [Support & FAQ](/support): Frequently asked questions about delivery, payments, refunds and Organic Mode.
